title: Publication-ready forest plot — plot_forest
text: Produces publication-ready forest plot UKB-standard styling. user supplies data frame whose first column row label (item), plus additional display columns (e.g. Cases/N). gap column auto-formatted (95% CI) text column inserted automatically ci_column. Numeric p-value columns declared via p_cols formatted -place.

title: Publication-ready forest plot — plot_forest
code: plot_forest(   data,   est,   lower,   upper,   ci_column = 2L,   ref_line = 1,   xlim = NULL,   ticks_at = NULL,   arrow_lab = c("Lower risk", "Higher risk"),   header = NULL,   indent = NULL,   bold_label = NULL,   ci_col = "black",   ci_sizes = 0.6,   ci_Theight = 0.2,   ci_digits = 2L,   ci_sep = ", ",   p_cols = NULL,   p_digits = 3L,   bold_p = TRUE,   p_threshold = 0.05,   align = NULL,   background = "zebra",   bg_col = "#F0F0F0",   border = "three_line",   border_width = 3,   row_height = NULL,   col_width = NULL,   save = FALSE,   dest = NULL,   save_width = 20,   save_height = NULL,   theme = "default" )

title: Publication-ready forest plot — plot_forest
text: data data.frame. First column must label column (item). Additional columns displayed -(character) formatted named p_cols (must numeric). Column order preserved. est Numeric vector. Point estimates (NA = CI drawn). lower Numeric vector. Lower CI bounds (length est). upper Numeric vector. Upper CI bounds (length est). ci_column Integer. Column position (final rendered table) gap/CI graphic placed. Must \(\ge 2\). Default: 2L. ref_line Numeric. Reference line. Default: 1 (HR/). Use 0 beta coefficients. xlim Numeric vector length 2. X-axis limits. NULL = auto. ticks_at Numeric vector. Tick positions. NULL = 5 evenly spaced ticks xlim supplied, otherwise auto. arrow_lab Character vector length 2. Directional labels. Default: c("Lower risk", "Higher risk"). NULL = none. header Character vector (length = final column count). Column header labels displayed table. NULL (default) = use column names data plus "gap_ci" "(95% CI)" two auto-inserted columns. Pass "" gap column position. indent Integer vector (length = nrow(data)). Indentation level label column: unit adds two leading spaces. Default: zeros. bold_label Logical vector (length = nrow(data)). rows bold label column. NULL (default) = auto-derive indent: rows indent == 0 bolded (parent rows), indented sub-rows plain. ci_col Character scalar vector (length = nrow(data)). CI colour(s). NA rows skipped automatically. Default: "black". ci_sizes Numeric. Point size. Default: 0.6. ci_Theight Numeric. CI cap height. Default: 0.2. ci_digits Integer. Decimal places auto-generated (95% CI) column. Default: 2L. ci_sep Character. Separator lower upper CI label, e.g. ", " " - ". Default: ", ". p_cols Character vector. Names numeric p-value columns data. formatted p_digits decimal places "<0.001"-style clipping. NULL = none. p_digits Integer. Decimal places p-value formatting. Default: 3L. bold_p TRUE (bold non-NA p p_threshold), FALSE (bolding), logical vector (per-row control). Default: TRUE. p_threshold Numeric. P-value threshold bolding bold_p = TRUE. Default: 0.05. align Integer vector. Alignment per column: -1 left, 0 centre, 1 right. May length = ncol(data) (original) length = final column count (original + 2 inserted); former auto-padded 0 two inserted columns. NULL = auto (column 1 left, others centre). background Character. Row background style: "zebra", "bold_label" (shade rows bold_label = TRUE), "none". Default: "zebra". bg_col Character. Shading colour backgrounds (scalar), per-row vector length nrow(data) (overrides style). Default: "#F0F0F0". border Character. Border style: "three_line" "none". Default: "three_line". border_width Numeric. Border line width(s). Scalar = three lines width; length-3 vector = top--header, bottom--header, bottom--body. Default: 3. row_height NULL (auto), numeric scalar, numeric vector (length = total gtable rows including margins). Auto sets 8 / 12 / 10 / 15 mm top / header / data / bottom respectively. col_width NULL (auto), numeric scalar, numeric vector (length = total gtable columns). Auto rounds default width adjustment \([5, 10)\) mm. save Logical. Save output files? Default: FALSE. dest Character. Destination file path (extension ignored; four formats saved). Required save = TRUE. save_width Numeric. Output width cm. Default: 20. save_height Numeric NULL. Output height cm. NULL = nrow(data) * 0.9 + 3. theme Character preset ("default") forestploter::forest_theme object. Default: "default".

title: Publication-ready forest plot — plot_forest
text: forestploter plot object (gtable), returned invisibly. Display plot() grid::grid.draw().

title: Publication-ready forest plot — plot_forest
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ df <- data.frame(   item      = c("Exposure vs. control", "Unadjusted", "Fully adjusted"),   `Cases/N` = c("", "89/4521", "89/4521"),   p_value   = c(NA_real_, 0.001, 0.006),   check.names = FALSE )  p <- plot_forest(   data       = df,   est        = c(NA, 1.52, 1.43),   lower      = c(NA, 1.18, 1.11),   upper      = c(NA, 1.96, 1.85),   ci_column  = 2L,   indent     = c(0L, 1L, 1L),   bold_label = c(TRUE, FALSE, FALSE),   p_cols     = "p_value",   xlim       = c(0.5, 3.0) ) plot(p) } # }

title: Publication-ready Table 1 (Baseline Characteristics) — plot_tableone
text: Generates publication-quality baseline-characteristics table (Table 1) using gtsummary, optional SMD column, Lancet-style theming, automatic export four formats.

title: Publication-ready Table 1 (Baseline Characteristics) — plot_tableone
code: plot_tableone(   data,   vars,   strata = NULL,   type = NULL,   label = NULL,   statistic = NULL,   digits = NULL,   percent = "column",   missing = "no",   add_p = TRUE,   add_smd = FALSE,   overall = FALSE,   exclude_labels = NULL,   theme = "lancet",   label_width = 200,   stat_width = 140,   pvalue_width = 100,   row_height = 8,   save = FALSE,   dest = NULL )

title: Publication-ready Table 1 (Baseline Characteristics) — plot_tableone
text: data data.frame. Input data containing variables. vars Character vector. Variable names display table. strata Character scalar. Column name grouping/stratification variable. NULL produces unstratified overall summary. type Named list NULL. Variable type overrides passed directly tbl_summary. E.g. list(age = "continuous2"). label Named list / formula list NULL. Label overrides. E.g. list(age ~ "Age (years)", sex ~ "Sex"). statistic Named list NULL. Statistic format strings. E.g. list(all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})"). digits Named list NULL. Decimal place overrides. E.g. list(age ~ 1). percent Character. Percentage base categorical variables: "column" (default), "row", "cell". missing Character. Display missing counts: "" (default), "ifany", "always". add_p Logical. Add p-value column. Default TRUE; silently disabled strata NULL. add_smd Logical. Add standardised mean difference (SMD) column. Continuous variables use Cohen's d; categorical variables use root-mean-square deviation (RMSD) group proportions. SMD shown label rows. Default FALSE; silently disabled strata NULL. overall Logical. Add Overall column strata set. Default FALSE. exclude_labels Character vector NULL. Row labels remove rendered table, matched exactly label column gtsummary table body. E.g. c("Unknown", "Missing"). theme Character. Visual theme preset. "lancet" (default) currently supported. Controls alternating row shading (#f8e8e7 / white), three-line borders, 15 px font size. label_width Integer. Label column width pixels. Default 200. stat_width Integer. Statistics column(s) width pixels. Default 140. pvalue_width Integer. P-value SMD column width pixels. Default 100. row_height Integer. Data row padding (top + bottom) pixels. Default 8. save Logical. Export table files. Default TRUE. dest Character NULL. File path without extension. save = TRUE, four files written: <dest>.docx, <dest>.html, <dest>.pdf, <dest>.png. Required save = TRUE.

title: Publication-ready Table 1 (Baseline Characteristics) — plot_tableone
text: gt table object, returned invisibly.

title: Publication-ready Table 1 (Baseline Characteristics) — plot_tableone
text: following behaviours fixed (exposed parameters): Variable labels bold (bold_labels()). P-values formatted <0.001 3 decimal places. Significant p-values (\(p < 0.05\)) bold. p-value column header rendered P-value. table uses three-line (booktabs) border. Saving always exports word, html, pdf, png.

what: ukbflow: Streamlined Workflow for UK Biobank Data Extraction, Analysis, and Visualization — ukbflow-package
title: ukbflow: Streamlined Workflow for UK Biobank Data Extraction, Analysis, and Visualization — ukbflow-package
text: R package UK Biobank cloud-based analysis Research Analysis Platform (RAP). Provides tools phenotype extraction decoding, variable derivation, survival association analysis, genetic risk score computation, publication-quality visualization.

title: ukbflow 0.1.0
text: auth_login() — authenticate RAP via dx-toolkit token auth_logout() — revoke current session auth_status() — check current login state auth_list_projects() — list accessible RAP projects auth_select_project() — set active RAP project

title: ukbflow 0.1.0
